<!-- indicator: fig-smoke-risk -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-smoke-risk
#| fig-cap: 'Increased Risk of Disease Incidence from Smoking, 2021'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Increased Risk of Disease Incidence from Smoking, 2021.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-smoke-risk", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
